description:
## Deep Component Audit ‚Äî hx-number-input

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-number-input/`
**NOTE:** No index.ts ‚Äî may be incomplete/from PR 175 rescue.

### wc-mcp Tools ‚Äî USE THESE
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `validate_usage`
- **Report wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Existence Check** ‚Äî Complete implementation? Document gaps.
2. **Design Tokens** ‚Äî `--hx-` tokens. Input, stepper buttons, border states. Dark mode.
3. **Accessibility** ‚Äî WCAG 2.1 AA. spinbutton role. aria-valuenow/min/max. Stepper button labels. Keyboard (arrow up/down).
4. **Functionality** ‚Äî Min/max/step. Stepper buttons. Keyboard increment. Validation. Form integration. Decimal precision.
5. **TypeScript** ‚Äî Strict. No `any`. Numeric types.
6. **CSS/Styling** ‚Äî Shadow DOM. Stepper layout. CSS Parts.
7. **CEM Accuracy** ‚Äî Must be documented if shipping.
8. **Tests** ‚Äî Stepping. Min/max. Keyboard. Validation. Form.
9. **Storybook** ‚Äî Default. With min/max. Step. Disabled.
10. **Drupal Compatibility** ‚Äî Number field. Twig-friendly.

### Deliverable
If incomplete: document gaps. If complete: full audit. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-number-input

2. **Design Tokens** ‚Äî `--hx-` tokens. Input, stepper buttons, border states. Dark mode.
3. **Accessibility** ‚Äî WCAG 2.1 AA. spinbutton role. aria-valuenow/min/max. Stepper button labels. Keyboard (arrow up/down).
